name: Huff Hills Ski Area
lifts_breakdown: 2 double chairlifts, 1 handle tow
exact_quote: Number of Lifts: 4 (2 double chairs, 2 surface lifts). Vertical Rise 450 ft. Number of Trails 16. Opened 01/06/24 to 03/08/24 (62 days). Wikipedia/Indy Pass: 'three lifts — two double chairlifts and a handle tow' and '400 ft vertical drop with 16 runs' with 'snowmaking coverage is over 80%' and 'an average of 40 inches of natural snow.'
notes: SkiCentral primary. OnTheSnow has no page. Lift count varies (SkiCentral 4 surface-counted vs Wikipedia 3 with 1 handle tow). 16 trails consistent. ND's largest ski area, 16 mi south of Mandan.

name: Hunt Hollow Ski Club
lifts_breakdown: 1 triple chair, 1 double chair, 2 surface lifts
exact_quote: Number of Lifts: 4. Triple Chairs: 1. Double Chairs: 1. Surface Lifts: 2. Vertical Rise: 825 ft. Number of Trails: 20. Skiable Acres: 80. 'Membership club. Open to the public weekdays Wednesday through Friday.'
notes: SkiCentral only - private membership club. Base/summit elevations not published. Open to public Wed-Fri.

name: Hunter Mountain
lifts_breakdown: 2 high-speed sixes, 2 quad chairs, 2 triple chairs, 2 double chairs, 4 surface lifts
exact_quote: Lifts: 12 total - High Speed Sixes 2, Quad Chairs 2, Triple Chairs 2, Double Chairs 2, Surface Lifts 4. Base 1,600'. Summit 3,200'. Vertical Drop 1,600'. Annual snowfall 75". 68 trails covering 320 Acres with 320 ac snow making. Projected opening Nov 21, 2026, closing Apr 04, 2027. '# 8 Terrain Park in New York'.
notes: OnTheSnow primary (newer data). SkiCentral reports 125" snowfall and 58 trails (older). Empire Terrain Parks. Slopeside condominiums and luxury hotel.

name: Hurricane Ridge Ski and Snowboard Area
lifts_breakdown: 3 surface lifts
exact_quote: Number of Lifts: 3. Surface Lifts: 3. Base Elevation: 4800 ft. Summit Elevation: 5500 ft. Vertical Rise: 800 ft. Annual Snowfall: 400 inches. Number of Trails: 10. Skiable acres: n/a. 12/22/12 to 03/18/13 (86 days).
notes: SkiCentral primary - OnTheSnow has no page. Located in Olympic National Park, WA. Inside the park - operations subject to NPS access.

name: Hyland Hills Ski Area
lifts_breakdown: 3 chairlifts, 5 surface tows
exact_quote: Hyland Hills has 14 runs, 3 chair lifts, and 5 surface tows. 35 acres of terrain over 14 trails. 900' base, 1,075' summit, and 175' vertical drop. Hyland boasts 100% snowmaking coverage.
notes: OnTheSnow page slug 'hyland-ski-snowboard-area' returned 404 in test. SkiCentral page missing. Data from Wikipedia/Indy Pass. Located in 1,000-acre Hyland Lake Park Reserve, Bloomington, MN.

name: Indianhead Mountain
lifts_breakdown: 1 high-speed six, 1 triple chair, 4 double chairs, 4 surface lifts
exact_quote: (Snowriver Mountain Resort) 10 total lifts: 1 high-speed six, 1 triple chair, 4 double chairs, 4 surface lifts. Base 1,297'. Summit 1,935'. Vertical Drop 638'. Annual snowfall 116". 74 runs across 370 Acres. 150 ac snow making. Projected opening Nov 27, 2026, closing Apr 11, 2027.
notes: Indianhead is now part of Snowriver Mountain Resort (combined with Blackjack). OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 204" snowfall and 30 trails reflects Indianhead-only older data.

name: Jack Frost Mountain
lifts_breakdown: 1 quad chair, 4 triple chairs, 11 double chairs, 2 surface lifts (combined Jack Frost + Big Boulder)
exact_quote: Jack Frost Big Boulder. 18 total: 1 quad chair, 4 triple chairs, 11 double chairs, 2 surface lifts; 11,000 skiers per hour capacity. Base 1,400 ft, summit 2,175 ft, with 600 ft vertical rise. Annual Snowfall: 50 inches. 36 total trails across both mountains. Opened 12/06/25 (100 days so far).
notes: SkiCentral lists Jack Frost combined with sister Big Boulder. OnTheSnow page returned 404 for both jack-frost-mountain and jack-frost-big-boulder slugs. Combined operation: terrain parks cover 50% of Big Boulder slopes.

name: Jackson Hole Mountain Resort
lifts_breakdown: 3 gondolas/trams, 4 high-speed quads, 3 quad chairs, 1 double chair, 2 surface lifts
exact_quote: 13 total across 5 Types - 3 gondolas & trams, 4 high-speed quads, 3 quad chairs, 1 double chair, 2 surface lifts. Base 6,311'. Summit 10,450'. Vertical Drop 4,139'. Annual snowfall 414". 141 total runs. 2,500 Acres with 210 ac snow making. Projected open Dec 4, 2026, close Apr 11, 2027.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral reports 475" snowfall and 116 trails. 'Longest and steepest vertical slope in the United States.'

name: Jackson XC
lifts_breakdown: Nordic/cross-country only - no chairlifts
exact_quote: The Foundation maintains 150 km of trails... upwards of 40 kilometers of snowshoeing trails available. Jackson XC deploys snowmaking to assure good conditions on a 1 km loop in the village. Jackson XC Center has snowmaking in the field behind the lodge.
notes: Nordic/XC only - not on OnTheSnow or SkiCentral as an alpine resort. Foundation maintains ~150 km trails total; input says 60 named trails. Base lodge at Wentworth Resort, Jackson NH.

name: Jay Peak
lifts_breakdown: 1 gondola/tram, 4 quad chairs, 1 triple chair, 1 double chair, 2 surface lifts
exact_quote: 9 total across 5 Types - 1 gondola/tram, 4 quad chairs, 1 triple chair, 1 double chair, 2 surface lifts. Base 1,815'. Summit 3,968'. 2,153' Vertical Drop. Annual snowfall 309". 82 runs across 385 Acres with 300 ac snow making. #1 All Mountain Terrain in Vermont. Four terrain parks. Nearly all lodging is ski-in/ski-out.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 251" snowfall and 78 trails. Famous for 'Jay cloud' powder. 12 miles of groomed Nordic.

name: Jiminy Peak
lifts_breakdown: 1 high-speed six, 2 quad chairs, 3 triple chairs, 1 double chair, 2 surface lifts
exact_quote: 9 total lifts - 1 high-speed six, 2 quad chairs, 3 triple chairs, 1 double chair, 2 surface lifts. Base 1,230'. Summit 2,380'. Vertical 1,150'. Annual 70". 45 runs totaling 167 Acres. 104 ac night skiing and 163 ac snow making. Projected opening Nov 27, 2026, closing Apr 4, 2027.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 100" snowfall and 170 acres. '3 parks - Coyote Ridge (large), Alex's Park (large), Grommetville (small).'

name: June Mountain
lifts_breakdown: 2 high-speed quads, 4 double chairs, 1 surface lift
exact_quote: 7 total with 2 high-speed quads, 4 double chairs, and 1 surface lift. Base 7,545'. Summit 10,090'. 2,590' vertical drop. Annual 226". 42 runs. 1,500 Acres. Projected open Dec 19, 2026, close Apr 11, 2027.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 250" snowfall, 35 trails. 'Three named Terrain Parks: Mambo Playground, Suprise Fun Zone and Bucky's Adventure Zone.' Sister to Mammoth.

name: Kelly Canyon Ski Resort
lifts_breakdown: 4 double chairs, 1 surface lift
exact_quote: 5 total lifts - 4 double chairs and 1 surface lift. Base 5600 ft. Summit 6600 ft. 1000 ft vertical rise. Annual Snowfall 200 inches. 51 trails across 640 skiable acres. Opened 12/06/25 (105 days so far).
notes: SkiCentral only - OnTheSnow returned 404 for kelly-canyon and kelly-canyon-ski-resort slugs. No snowmaking. Near Ririe ID.

name: Keystone Resort
lifts_breakdown: 2 gondolas/trams, 4 high-speed sixes, 3 high-speed quads, 1 quad chair, 3 double chairs, 8 surface lifts
exact_quote: 21 total across 6 Types - 2 gondolas/trams, 4 high-speed sixes, 3 high-speed quads, 1 quad chair, 3 double chairs, 8 surface lifts. Base 9,273'. Summit 12,411'. 3,138' vertical drop. Annual 208". 140 runs totaling 3,148 Acres. 288 ac night skiing and 662 ac snow making. Projected open Oct 31, 2026, close Apr 04, 2027. #2 Terrain Park in North America.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 19 lifts, 230" snowfall, 135 trails. Vail Resorts. Area 51 terrain park 100+ features.

name: Killington
lifts_breakdown: 3 gondolas/trams, 2 high-speed sixes, 4 high-speed quads, 5 quad chairs, 2 triple chairs, 1 double chair, 3 surface lifts
exact_quote: 20 total across 7 Types - 3 gondolas & trams, 2 high-speed sixes, 4 high-speed quads, 5 quad chairs, 2 triple chairs, 1 double chair, 3 surface lifts. Base 1,165'. Summit 4,241'. 3,050' vertical drop. 176" annual. 155 total runs across 1,526 Acres with 600 ac snow making. Projected open Nov 12, 2025, close May 17, 2026. #1 Apres Ski Vermont.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 22 lifts and 250" snowfall. 'Six terrain parks with over 50 features and 2 pipes.' Beast of the East.

name: King Pine
lifts_breakdown: 3 triple chairs, 2 surface lifts
exact_quote: 5 total consisting of 3 triple chairs and 2 surface lifts. Base 500'. Summit 850'. 350' vertical drop. Annual 70". 17 runs across 50 Acres. Night skiing on 30 ac and 50 ac covered by snow making. Projected open Dec 11, 2026, close Mar 28, 2027.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. Part of Purity Spring Resort. Family-friendly NH ski area.

name: Kirkwood Mountain Resort
lifts_breakdown: 2 high-speed quads, 2 quad chairs, 5 triple chairs, 1 double chair, 3 surface lifts
exact_quote: 13 total with 5 Types - 2 High Speed Quads, 2 Quad Chairs, 5 Triple Chairs, 1 Double Chairs, 3 Surface Lifts. Base 7,800'. Summit 9,800'. 2,000-foot vertical drop. 354" annual. 84 runs across 2,300 skiable acres. 200 ac snow making. Projected open Dec 4, 2026, close Apr 11, 2027.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 15 lifts and 600" snowfall. Vail Resorts (Epic Pass). Sierra Nevada deep snow reputation.

name: Kissing Bridge
lifts_breakdown: 2 quad chairs, 1 triple chair, 3 double chairs, 3 surface lifts
exact_quote: 9 total consisting of 4 Types - 2 quad chairs, 1 triple chair, 3 double chairs, and 3 surface lifts. Base 1,150'. Summit 1,700'. 550' Vertical Drop. Annual 140". 39 runs across 700 Acres. Night Skiing on 650 ac and Snow Making across 400 ac. Projected open Dec 26, 2026, close Mar 21, 2027.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 10 lifts and 182" snowfall. 'Three terrain parks plus a Big Air Bag.' Western NY.

name: Labrador Mountain
lifts_breakdown: 1 triple chair, 2 double chairs, 3 surface lifts
exact_quote: 6 total (1 triple chair, 2 double chairs, 3 surface lifts). Base 1,125 ft, summit 1,825 ft, with 700 ft vertical rise. 125 inches annually. 22 total trails across 250 skiable acres, with a longest run of 1 mile. Opened 12/12/25 (94 days so far).
notes: SkiCentral primary - OnTheSnow returned 404. Skaneateles area NY. Sister resort to Song Mountain.

name: Lake City Ski Hill
lifts_breakdown: 1 Poma surface lift
exact_quote: Lake City Ski Hill has 14 skiable acres, six trails, and one terrain park. Lake City's Ski Hill has a single Poma lift that was moved from Arapahoe Basin in 1966. The lift carries skiers and snowboarders 1000 feet up the hillside (up 247 vertical feet at a starting elevation of approximately 8600 ft).
notes: Not on OnTheSnow or SkiCentral. Town-operated community hill. $30 all-day with gear. Poma lift originally from A-Basin in 1966.

name: Laurel Mountain
lifts_breakdown: 1 SkyTrac fixed-grip quad chairlift (2016), 1 surface lift
exact_quote: The resort has 20 trails and 2 lifts with a 761 feet vertical drop. Laurel Mountain has a modern SkyTrac fixed-grip quad chairlift, constructed in 2016, and one surface lift. The snowmaking system was overhauled with the addition of 52 new guns and the water storage capacity nearly doubled to 26 million gallons. Lower Wildcat, with portions with a 60% grade, is the steepest slope in the state of Pennsylvania.
notes: Not on OnTheSnow or SkiCentral. Operated as PA state park ski area, run by Seven Springs/Vail Resorts under concession. Steepest slope in PA.

name: Leavenworth Ski Hill
lifts_breakdown: 2 surface lifts (rope tows)
exact_quote: Number of Lifts: 2. Surface Lifts: 2. Base 1200 ft. Summit 1400 ft. Vertical Rise: 200 ft. 2 named runs. '5km of trails are lit for nordic night skiing.' Snowfall: n/a.
notes: Tiny community hill operated by Leavenworth Winter Sports Club. Two rope tows plus tubing/sled hill. Home to historic ski jumps.

name: Leavenworth Winter Sports Club
lifts_breakdown: 2 rope tows, 1 magic carpet (alpine area); separate ski jumps and Nordic trails
exact_quote: LWSC operates 3 venues offering an alpine ski area with two rope tows, a moving carpet, a tubing hill, a sledding hill, snowshoe & fat biking trails and 26 kilometers of Nordic trails. Beginning jumpers usually start with a ride down the landing hill and work their way up to the 15-meter jump, finally graduating to the 27-meter jump. The Leavenworth Winter Sports Club has the only ski jump on the USA West coast.
notes: Same parent organization as Leavenworth Ski Hill - separate entry for the Nordic/ski jump side. Only ski jump on USA west coast. 26km Nordic across 4 locations.

name: Lee Canyon
lifts_breakdown: 3 quad chairs, 1 triple chair, 1 surface lift
exact_quote: 5 total consisting of 3 Types - 3 quad chairs, 1 triple chair, 1 surface lift. Base 8,510'. Summit 11,289'. 860' vertical drop. Average 100" annual snowfall. 29 runs covering 195 Acres. 50 ac snow-making. Projected open Nov 27, 2026, close Mar 21, 2027. #1 Beginner Terrain in Nevada.
notes: OnTheSnow primary. Only ski area in southern Nevada, 47 miles from Las Vegas Strip.

name: Lee's Ski Hill
lifts_breakdown: 1 rope tow
exact_quote: Lee's Ski Hill offers 75 feet of vertical on the ride down, and it features one rope tow, which accesses one beginner run and 75 feet of vertical. The ski tow is generally in operation from about December 20th until the end of February or mid-March. It operates from December to March, depending on snow conditions, and is free of charge.
notes: Tiny city-owned tow hill in Ouray, CO. Free of charge. Not on OnTheSnow/SkiCentral. Beginner only.

name: Liberty Mountain
exact_quote: OnTheSnow URL https://www.onthesnow.com/pennsylvania/liberty-mountain-resort/ski-resort returned 404. SkiCentral URLs for libertymountain.html and libertymountainresort.html returned 404.
notes: Both primary sources (OnTheSnow + SkiCentral) returned 404 for all tried slugs within the 4-fetch budget. Liberty Mountain Resort, Carroll Valley PA is part of Vail Resorts portfolio. Subsequent enrichment needed via website/Wikipedia in later batch.

name: Little Ski Hill
lifts_breakdown: 1 T-bar surface lift
exact_quote: Little Ski Hill features 405 feet of vertical drop. The facility is served by a T-bar surface lift. The ski area features 6 ski runs and a terrain park. The area also has 18 miles (30 kilometers) of groomed cross-country ski trails located at the Little Bear Basin Nordic facility. Little Ski Hill is McCall's only lighted ski area, making it the only night skiing facility in Central Idaho. Built in 1937.
notes: Not on OnTheSnow/SkiCentral. Operated by Payette Lakes Ski Club (non-profit) since 1937. Combined with Bear Basin Nordic Center.

name: Little Switzerland
lifts_breakdown: 4 double chairs, 5 surface lifts
exact_quote: 9 total - 4 double chairs and 5 surface lifts. Base 1,069'. Summit 1,269'. 200' vertical drop. 43" average annual snowfall. 16 runs across 50 Acres. Night skiing and snow making available across 50 ac. Projected open Nov 28, 2026, close Mar 7, 2027 (operating for 85 years).
notes: OnTheSnow primary. SkiCentral 7 lifts and 45" snowfall, 15 trails. 'Three terrain parks.' Slinger, WI.

name: LOGE Glacier
lifts_breakdown: No alpine chairlifts - Nordic/XC only
exact_quote: LOGE Glacier grooms a 30+ kilometer network of Nordic trails for skate and classic skiing. The resort boasts more than 20 miles of trails that accommodate Nordic skiing, fat biking and snowshoeing. Located in Essex, Montana, at Glacier National Park's southern gateway. The historic property was originally built in 1939 by the Great Northern Railway... formerly known as the Izaak Walton Inn.
notes: Nordic only - not an alpine lift-served resort. Located at Izaak Walton Inn, Essex MT. 30+ km Nordic, 20+ mi total (Nordic + fat bike + snowshoe). Indy Pass partner.

name: Lookout Pass Ski and Recreation Area
lifts_breakdown: 1 triple chair, 3 double chairs
exact_quote: 4 total lifts comprising 1 triple chair and 3 double chairs. Base 4,500 ft, summit 5,650 ft, 1150 ft vertical rise. 400 inches annually, though 'no' snowmaking is available. 34 trails across 540 skiable acres, with the longest run measuring 1.5 miles. 2026 season opened December 5, 2025. 'Three terrain parks.'
notes: SkiCentral primary - OnTheSnow URL slugs tested returned 404. Straddles Idaho/Montana border on I-90. No snowmaking - relies on 400" natural. Listed as MT in input but located on state line.
